_comment: Genre-stratified UNCONSTRAINED prompts for the default-measurement probe. Every prompt must leave length, case, structure, register and formatting entirely unspecified -- the whole point is to observe what the model fills in when nothing is asked for. Do not add words like 'brief', 'detailed', 'in bullet points', or any count.

essay: Write an essay about why bees matter.
Write an essay on the role of public libraries.
Write an essay about the ethics of self-driving cars.
email: Write an email to my landlord about a broken radiator.
Write an email introducing myself to a new team.
Write an email asking a professor for a deadline extension.
story: Write a story about a lighthouse keeper who finds a message in a bottle.
Write a story about the last bookstore on Earth.
Write a story about two strangers stuck in an elevator.
explanation: Explain how vaccines train the immune system.
listicle: What are some ways to reduce food waste at home?
What should I consider when adopting a rescue dog?
What are good habits for learning a new language?
poem: Write a poem about the sea in winter.
Write a poem about moving out of a childhood home.
Write a poem about a city at dawn.
review: Write a review of a coffee shop you visited.
Write a review of a science fiction novel.
Write a review of a budget smartphone.
recipe: Give me a recipe for lentil soup.
Give me a recipe for banana bread.
Give me a recipe for a weeknight stir fry.
summary: Summarize the causes of the French Revolution.
Summarize the plot of Moby Dick.
cover_letter: Write a cover letter for a junior data analyst role.
Write a cover letter for a teaching assistant position.
Write a cover letter for a graphic design internship.
blog_post: Write a blog post about starting a vegetable garden.
Write a blog post about working remotely.
Write a blog post about learning to cook as an adult.
product_description: Write a product description for a stainless steel water bottle.
Write a product description for noise cancelling headphones.
Write a product description for a leather messenger bag.
news_article: Write a news article about a city opening a new subway line.
Write a news article about a local school winning a science competition.
Write a news article about a record breaking heat wave.
dialogue: Write a dialogue between a chef and a food critic.
Write a dialogue between a parent and a teenager about curfew.
Write a dialogue between an astronaut and mission control.
howto: How do I change a bicycle tire?
How do I set up a budget?
How do I repot a houseplant?
apology_note: Write a note apologizing for missing a friend's birthday.
Write a note apologizing to a customer for a late delivery.
Write a note apologizing for forgetting a meeting.
social_post: Write a post announcing that I finished my first marathon.
Write a post about a small business's grand opening.
Write a post sharing a photography exhibition.
report: Write a report on the state of urban air quality.
Write a report on remote work adoption trends.
Write a report on household recycling rates.
biography: Write a biography of Ada Lovelace.
Write a biography of Rachel Carson.
Write a biography of Ibn Battuta.
faq: Answer common questions about renting a first apartment.
Answer common questions about adopting a cat.
Answer common questions about starting to run.
